ground_truth_provenance.details: Targets are loaded from ETT/Solar CSV datasets via Dataset_ETT_hour, Dataset_ETT_minute, and Dataset_Custom; saved trues are produced independently from predictions.

score_normalization.details: Primary MSE/MAE are raw metrics against true arrays; relative gains divide by matched same-seed GELU MSE, not by prediction statistics.

result_existence.details: 972/972 canonical seed-runs are reusable; all 324 config cells have three seeds.

duplicates_and_protocol.details: No duplicate canonical keys; no wrong batch/epoch rows; no non-finite MSE/MAE rows in the main raw file.

scope.details: Scope supports matched-protocol activation sensitivity, not a universal activation, deployed router, or original Informer reproduction claim.

claim_impact.claim: Activation choice is dataset- and horizon-sensitive under matched Informer settings.
Bounded/tanh-family activations are strong static choices.
A factor-conditioned activation router is deployable.
